title: Survival Analysis
business_process: Run one real survival stratification on a TCGA slice and turn it into a provenance-tagged finding object the graph can accept.

acceptance_criteria.text: The TCGA LUAD slice loads from the on-disk cache with no network call.
The high/low signature split is reproducible: the same input yields the same groups and the same n.
The analysis reports HR, 95% CI, p, and n per arm, and states whether the result is univariate or stage-adjusted.
The run_analysis output is accepted by the write path without hand-editing.
A biologist confirms the effect size and cohort are defensible — the numbers must survive being read aloud on stage.

open_questions: Is the demo's headline result univariate or stage-adjusted? F-093 was abandoned because the effect collapsed under stage adjustment — see review-queue.md row 1.
